recommendations.title: Home Sweet Hell
recommendations.overview: Don Champagne seems to have it all, but when his wife, Mona, learns of his affair with a pretty new salesgirl, she will stop at nothing to maintain their storybook life.

recommendations.title: SMS: Sotto Mentite Spoglie
recommendations.overview: A married man with two children, faithful and in love with his wife,  discovers that his wife would like to spice up the menage a little. He plays along and starts texting her as if he were his lover.

recommendations.title: La vita facile
recommendations.overview: An Italian doctor starts a new life in Kenya to escape the city, but life catches up with him when an old friend offers his assistance along with his wife, who happens to be an old lover.

recommendations.title: Only Mine
recommendations.overview: Tormented and left for dead by a scorned lover, a woman finds the strength within herself to recover and retaliate against her abuser.

recommendations.title: Poor Pierrot
recommendations.overview: One night, Arlequin comes to see his lover Colombine. But then Pierrot knocks at the door and Colombine and Arlequin hide. Pierrot starts singing but Arlequin scares him and the poor man goes away.

recommendations.title: Another 9 1/2 Weeks
recommendations.overview: Despondent at losing his lover, a man wanders the streets of Paris and has an affair with her kinky friend.

recommendations.title: Loving Adults
recommendations.overview: The thin line between love and hate turns deadly when a wife discovers her husband’s affair — and they both take extreme measures to get what they want.

recommendations.title: All That Divides Us
recommendations.overview: A middle-class house in the middle of nowhere. A council estate in Sète. A mother and daughter. Two childhood friends. A vanishing. Blackmail. A clash between two worlds.

recommendations.title: Better Living Through Chemistry
recommendations.overview: A straight-laced pharmacist's uneventful life spirals out of control when he starts an affair with a trophy wife customer who takes him on a joyride involving sex, drugs and possibly murder.

recommendations.title: Tom at the Farm
recommendations.overview: A young man travels to an isolated farm for his lover's funeral where he's quickly drawn into a twisted, sexually charged game by his lover's aggressive brother.
